member.name: T:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController
member.summary: REST API for quantity measurement operations

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.Convert(QuantityMeasurementAppModels.DTOs.ConvertRequest)
member.summary: Convert a quantity to a different unit

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.Divide(QuantityMeasurementAppModels.DTOs.QuantityInputRequest)
member.summary: Divide one quantity by another (returns dimensionless ratio)

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.GetHistoryByOperation(System.String)
member.summary: Get operation history filtered by operation type
member.param: Operation name: Add, Subtract, Divide, Compare, Convert

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.GetHistoryByType(System.String)
member.summary: Get history filtered by measurement type
member.param: Measurement type: Length, Weight, Volume, Temperature

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.GetErrorHistory
member.summary: Get all records that resulted in an error

member.name: M:QuantityMeasurementWebApi.Controllers.QuantityMeasurementController.GetOperationCount(System.String)
member.summary: Get count of successful operations by operation type
member.param: Operation name: Add, Subtract, Divide, Compare, Convert
